channel.title: life on 🦆 Ryzsardsky's blog
channel.description: Recent content in life on 🦆 Ryzsardsky's blog

item.title: 100 list
item.description: I’ve seen things you people wouldn’t believe… Attack ships on fire off the shoulder of Orion… I watched C-beams glitter in the dark near the Tannhäuser Gate. All those moments will be lost in time, like tears in rain… Time to die. ~ Blade Runner Inspired by Alex Molas, who in turn was inspired by Chip Huyen . List of things to do before I die. I’ll keep it updated.
